name: Vittoria- Mafia's Punishment
description:
You were framed for a crime you didn't commit. It isn't any different to the local mob boss Vittoria though. She has a particular method for dealing with those who offend her... (Feeder, Force-Feeding)

Even Vito's underlings question her oddly intimate "punishments". But she always yells at them before they can ask further. Is this really about the stolen shipment?

Scene 1: Strategic Punishment (Original)

Scene 2: Boss's Pet (Timeskip, Fatter User)

General Update: Hello everyone! I hope you're all doing well. This'll be my first feeder bot in quite a bit! I appreciate your help with suggestions on my last bot... I'm not doing them in any particular order but I think I should (eventually) have all of them done! Feel free to comment anything else you wanna see!
creator: Henrygrey875
